title: Revised Phantoms
description: Improves Phantoms and adds Phantom related content
body:
! This mod requires GeckoLib !

 

Revised Phantoms aims to improve phantoms to be a challenging addition to the game rather than an annoyance.

Changes phantoms and adds phantom related content to make the mob feel more fleshed out.

 

Phantom Changes:

- Phantoms no longer spawn from insomnia

- Phantoms will only spawn naturally after a player has unlocked the Acquire Hardware achievement

- Phantoms spawn naturally during full moons (every 8 nights)

- Phantoms spawn naturally in the end

- Phantoms stats have been changed

 

Stat changes:

Vanilla Phantoms: 20 Health, 2 Damage

Revised Phantoms: 10 Health, 5 Damage, Increased knockback

 

Items:

Phantom Eye - Food item dropped from Phantoms

 

 

Phantom Bone - Rare material dropped from Phantoms

 

    

Phantom Knife - Throwing weapon

 

 

Phantom Wings - Doesnt enable flying, but double jump and gliding

 

 

Potion of Levitation - Brewed with a Phantom Bone and Potion of Slow Falling

 

 + 4 New Achievements related to the items

 

Enchantments:

Suspending - Phantom Knife enchantment, treasure, inflicts Levitation for 1s

Curse of Decay - Items cannot be enchanted with mending or unbreaking
